title: FPS Essentials
description: A modpack full of the main FPS boosters in the community. Perfect for low-end laptops and computers. It also allows running shaders with little to no lag.
body:
### DESCRIPTION
This modpack contains Sodium, Lithium, Iris Shaders and Entity Culling.  
What this modpack does is speed up your game—a lot.  
It does this in many ways. Sodium provides a new, modern rendering engine that speeds up the game significantly.  
But we can do more. Lithium allows no compromises to be made on the logic side of your client or server meanwhile Entity Culling skips all entities which arent visible from the rendering stage.  
Iris is used to provide the ability to run incredible shaders at an outstanding speed. Allowing you to use shaders without slowing the game down.
These mods are amazing, go give them a follow and a download.
## Websites
Sodium: https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium  
Lithium: https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium  
Iris: https://modrinth.com/mod/iris  
Entity Culling: https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling  

#### These mods have been tested together and work like a charm ✨️
